schema.description: Simple schema for extracting key contract terms for later non-compliance analysis.

document.description: Basic information about the contract or amendment.

suncor_agrmnt_num.description: Suncor Agreement Number - Suncor identifier or filename for this document or agreement.

counter_party_agrmnt_num.description: Counter Party Agreement Number - Agreement numberor filename associated with Counter Party.

title.description: Title or description of the contract.

effective_start.description: Effective start date if stated (free-form, not necessarily ISO).

effective_end.description: Effective end date or term description if stated.

amends_documents.description: Identifiers of prior documents this document amends or supersedes.

name.description: Legal or business name, e.g. "Suncor Energy Inc.".

short_name.description: Short name or defined term in the contract, e.g. "Seller", "Suncor".

terms.description: Key terms/obligations/specifications that can be evaluated for compliance.

term_id.description: Unique id for this extracted term within this document.

summary.description: Short plain-language summary of what this term requires or specifies.

obligor.description: Party primarily responsible for complying with this term (use party name or short_name).

obligee.description: Party that benefits from or can enforce this term (if clear).

conditions.description: Short descriptions of conditions under which this term applies (e.g. "only undisputed invoices").

timeframe.description: Timing information relevant to compliance for this term.

description.description: Plain description of timing, e.g. "within 5 Business Days after invoice receipt".

type.description: Type of timing rule, if identifiable.

anchor_event.description: Name or description of the event the timing is relative to, e.g. "invoice receipt", "cargo delivery".

offset_value.description: Offset as described in the contract, e.g. "5 Business Days", "30 days", "end of month".

quantitative_details.description: Numeric or measurable aspects of the term, if any.

amount.description: Amount or quantity as described, e.g. "100,000 bbl per month", "USD 25,000 per day".

unit.description: Unit of measure or currency, e.g. "bbl", "m3", "USD", "CAD".

tolerance_or_range.description: Any stated tolerance or range, e.g. "+/- 5%", "minimum 34 API".

price_or_rate_formula.description: Any described formula for price, rate, interest, or fees.

exceptions_or_relief.description: Any exceptions, relief clauses, or references to force majeure that modify this term.

remedies_or_consequences.description: Any described consequences, penalties, interest, or remedies for non-compliance with this term.

source_text.description: Exact or near-exact text from the contract that this term is based on.

confidence.description: Model confidence in this extraction between 0 and 1.

comments.description: Any notes about ambiguity, interpretation choices, or alternative readings.
